fingerprint: Every undisclosed parameter in the dome model traces to globe-framework measurements. The dome has no independent measurement infrastructure — all inputs flow through INTERMAGNET, WGS84/IGRF, NOAA, and gravimeters calibrated to globe physics. The zero-fitted-parameters claim is not just dishonest counting; it disguises total observational dependence on the framework it claims to replace.

globe_values.B_field_amplitude: 60,000 nT (single-pole) or 62,376/64,852 nT (two-pole) — measured by INTERMAGNET, calibrated against IGRF globe model
globe_values.coupling_kappa: 1.67 nT/μGal — ratio of INTERMAGNET magnetometer / SG gravimeter readings (both globe-calibrated)
globe_values.obliquity: 23.45° — Earth axial tilt, pure globe parameter with no flat-earth analog
globe_values.NMP_constants: 55 km/yr initial rate, 0.08 deceleration — curve-fitted to NOAA NMP track in geographic (globe) coordinates
globe_values.Schumann_damping: 26% gap between theoretical 10.59 Hz and observed 7.83 Hz — observed in Earth-ionosphere waveguide (spherical cavity)
globe_values.lambda_g: 8,619 km — claimed geometric derivation from H(r), but H(r) is fitted to globe atmospheric data

dome_claim: Zero fitted parameters — the aetheric scale length λ_g = 8,619 km is derived from cavity geometry and independently predicts six domains
why_it_matters: The dome model is observationally parasitic on globe physics. It cannot generate a single prediction without globe-measured inputs. The boundary-condition defense fails because standard physics boundary conditions (Earths mass, field strength) have multiple independent derivations, while every dome boundary condition has exactly one source: globe measurements. Calling empirically fitted values boundary conditions is a semantic relabeling, not a physical distinction.
suggested_text: Consider adding an aggregate paragraph to Section 6.1: "Beyond the individual parameter counts, a structural pattern emerges: every undisclosed parameter in the dome model traces to measurements made within the globe observational framework. The B-field amplitudes come from INTERMAGNET (a magnetometer network that assumes spherical Earth coordinates), the coupling constant κ uses superconducting gravimeter data calibrated to WGS84, the solar declination uses the globes 23.45° obliquity, and the NMP drift constants are fitted to NOAA tracks plotted in geographic coordinates. The dome model has no independent measurement apparatus. Its parameter space IS the globe models observation space — making zero fitted parameters not merely a miscount, but a concealment of total observational dependence on the framework it claims to replace."

code_search.found_in: inject_ai_layer.py lines 88-98: core_parameters object lists disc_radius_km=20015, magnetic_gravity_coupling=1.67, field_decay_rate_nT_yr=28 as hardcoded values with no derivation chain
code_search.notes: The geomagnetic coefficients (62376/64852) were NOT found in inject_ai_layer.py — they appear only in the HTML wins display. The core_parameters block treats κ=1.67 as a fundamental constant despite being an empirical ratio. No file in the repo derives any core parameter from dome geometry.
